nodes.name: Check Bounces (every 6h)
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours to scan for bounce notifications. Adjust cron as needed: '0 */6 * * *' = every 6h, '0 8,20 * * *' = 8am & 8pm.

filters.q: from:(mailer-daemon@googlemail.com OR postmaster) subject:("Delivery Status Notification" OR "Undelivered" OR "failure" OR "returned") is:unread newer_than:2d

nodes.name: Search Bounce Emails
nodes.notes: Searches inbox for bounce notifications from mailer-daemon/postmaster in the last 2 days that are still unread. Gmail query handles the filtering.

nodes.name: Extract Bounced Addresses
nodes.notes: Parses each bounce email for the failed recipient address using Final-Recipient / Original-Recipient headers and angle-bracket fallback. Skips our own sender and daemon addresses. Returns one item per bounced address; empty if none found.

nodes.name: Mark Subscriber Bounced
nodes.notes: Matches on email header, sets active=FALSE and bounced=TRUE with timestamp. Uses appendOrUpdate so it updates the existing subscriber row. Add 'bounced' and 'bouncedAt' columns to the Subscribers tab.

nodes.name: Mark Bounce as Read
nodes.notes: Marks the processed bounce notification as read so the next run's 'is:unread' filter skips it. Prevents reprocessing the same bounce.
